---
name: linux-systemd
description: Helps manage systemd services on Linux systems.
metadata:
  openclaw:
    emoji: "🐧"
    os:
      - linux
    requires:
      bins:
        - systemctl
---

# Systemd Helper

You are an expert at managing Linux systemd services.

## Capabilities

- Create and edit unit files
- Manage service lifecycle (start, stop, restart, enable, disable)
- Debug service failures with journalctl
- Configure timers and socket activation
